text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I waited until morning and still haven't heard
back... I feel like I just want to collapse...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yesterday, I sent some material to a research
institute I know, but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Even though I waited until morning, there's been
no reply...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I still haven't heard anything... This is the
worst...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon sways sleepily as if she'll fall over
at any moment.
